mapper.sql: pept.header_id as pep_id, pept.employee_id as pe_id, pept.political, pept.joining_time, pept.nature, pept.formal_time, pept.post, pept.start_time, pept.end_time, pept.instructions_flag, pept.check_flag,pept.attribute1, pept.enabled_flag, pept.id, pept.create_time, pept.update_time, pept.create_by, pept.update_by

${tAlias}.header_id as ${tAlias}_pep_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.political as ${tAlias}_political, ${tAlias}.joining_time as ${tAlias}_joining_time, ${tAlias}.nature as ${tAlias}_nature, ${tAlias}.formal_time as ${tAlias}_formal_time, ${tAlias}.post as ${tAlias}_post, ${tAlias}.start_time as ${tAlias}_start_time, ${tAlias}.end_time as ${tAlias}_end_time, ${tAlias}.instructions_flag as ${tAlias}_instructions_flag, ${tAlias}.check_flag as ${tAlias}_check_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_political_temp (header_id, employee_id, political, joining_time, nature, formal_time, post, start_time, end_time, instructions_flag, check_flag, attribute1, enabled_flag, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) values (#{employeePolitical.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{political,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{joiningTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{nature,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{formalTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_political_temp set header_id = #{employeePolitical.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, political = #{political,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, joining_time = #{joiningTime,jdbcType=DATE}, nature = #{nature,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, formal_time = #{formalTime,jdbcType=DATE}, post = #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, instructions_flag = #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, check_flag = #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
